name: GAF_GenAI_CreateTool_Tool_v1
description: Create a new API_DOCS Tool asset in Infor OS GenAI from a specification.
instructions: Create a new Tool in Infor OS GenAI. Tools MUST use type API_DOCS. Required fields: name (GAF_<Product>_<Capability>_Tool_v<N> format), description, instructions, type (MUST be API_DOCS), data object. The data object MUST contain: servicePath, api_docs, headers, responseInstructions, returnDirect, model. Returns: guid, name, type. HTTP 409 means name conflict - use UpdateAsset instead.

data.api_docs:
Method: POST
Endpoint: /api/v1/tools
Headers: Content-Type: application/json
Body: JSON array with ONE tool object.
REQUIRED PAYLOAD STRUCTURE:
[{
  "name": "GAF_<Product>_<Capability>_Tool_v<N>",
  "description": "What the tool does",
  "instructions": "How to use this tool and what parameters it accepts",
  "type": "API_DOCS",
  "data": {
    "servicePath": "<service-path-without-tenant>",
    "api_docs": "Method: GET|POST|PUT|DELETE\nEndpoint: /path\nHeaders: ...\nBody: ...",
    "headers": {"Content-Type": "application/json"},
    "responseInstructions": "How to interpret the API response",
    "returnDirect": false,
    "model": {"model": "CLAUDE", "version": "claude-3-7-sonnet-20250219-v1:0"}
  }
}]
IMPORTANT: type MUST be API_DOCS. Other types (SCRIPT, TOOLKIT, etc.) are NOT supported for tools.
Example Request:
POST /api/v1/tools
Content-Type: application/json
[{"name":"GAF_Test_Sample_Tool_v1","description":"Sample tool","instructions":"Use this tool","type":"API_DOCS","data":{"servicePath":"GENAI/coresvc","api_docs":"Method: GET\nEndpoint: /api/v1/test","headers":{},"responseInstructions":"Parse response","returnDirect":false,"model":{"model":"CLAUDE","version":"claude-3-7-sonnet-20250219-v1:0"}}}]
data.responseInstructions:
Success: [{"guid":"new-guid","name":"...","type":"API_DOCS",...}]. HTTP 409: Name conflict (tool exists). HTTP 422: Validation failure. HTTP 500: Check payload structure matches required format exactly.

CRITICAL - IF ERROR OCCURS INCLUDE THE BELOW IN RESPONSE:
---DEBUG---
FULL_URL: [The complete URL that was called]
FULL_PAYLOAD: [The exact request body sent (JSON format)]
FULL_RESPONSE: [The complete API response received]
---END DEBUG---
